recommendations.title: The Last King
recommendations.overview: Norway, 1204. A civil war between the birkebeiners —the king's men— and the baglers —supporters of the Norwegian aristocracy and the Church— ravages the country. Two men must protect a baby, the illegitimate son of King Håkon, who will be the future

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Pretty Persuasion
recommendations.overview: A 15-year-old girl incites chaos among her friends and a media frenzy when she accuses her drama teacher of sexual harassment.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Errementari: The Blacksmith and the Devil
recommendations.overview: Basque Country, Spain, 1843. A police constable arrives at a small village in Álava to investigate a mysterious blacksmith who lives alone deep in the woods.

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.

recommendations.title: Where Do We Go Now?
recommendations.overview: In a remote, isolated Lebanese village surrounded by land mines, Muslims and Christians live together in peace. As civil strife starts to engulf the country around them, the women in the village try, by various means and to varying success, to keep t

recommendations.title: Sacco & Vanzetti
recommendations.overview: Boston, 1920. Italian immigrants Nicola Sacco and Bartolomeo Vanzetti are charged and unfairly tried for murder on the basis of their anarchist political beliefs.

recommendations.title: The Devils
recommendations.overview: A charismatic 17th-century French priest becomes the target of a sexually obsessed nun’s witchcraft accusations, which corrupt church and state officials are all too happy to exploit.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
